versions.version_description: Kenny Loggins was born in Everett,Washington and was greatly known for his soundtrack songs ,most notably Footloose 1984 ,Top gun with Danger Zone 1986 and Nobody,s Fool from Caddyshack 2 1988 .You Tube link to this song https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=U8SSdyflGN4 Which users may find easier to play with capo on 3rd fret tranpose these chords - 3.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Fm[/ch]  [ch]Fm7[/ch]  [ch]Fm6[/ch]  [ch]Db/F[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]
There have been times in my life[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db/F[/ch]
I've been wondering why[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm/F[/ch]     [ch]Cm/F[/ch]    [ch]Dbmaj7/F[/ch]
Still somehow I believed[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Fm6[/ch]       [ch]Eb/F[/ch]  [ch]C7/F[/ch]
We'd always survive[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Fm[/ch]
Now I'm not so sure[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Fm[/ch]
You're waiting to hear[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db/F[/ch]
One good reason to try[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db/Bb[/ch]    [ch]Ab/C[/ch]       [ch]Fm/C#[/ch]
But what more can I say[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Fm6/D[/ch]      [ch]Ebsus2[/ch]
What's left to provide[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch] [ch]Bb7[/ch]        [ch]Ebmaj9[/ch]     [ch]Abmaj7[/ch]
You think that maybe it's over[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7-5[/ch]  [ch]Db7+11[/ch]      [ch]Abmaj7[/ch]     [ch]C7add11[/ch]
       Only if you want it to be[/tab]

[Solo Chords]
[ch]Fm[/ch]  [ch]Fm7[/ch]  [ch]Fm6[/ch]  [ch]Db/F[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab]           [ch]Fm[/ch]
Nowhere to run[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Fm[/ch]
Nowhere to hide[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Db/F[/ch]
No time for wondering why[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Db/Bb[/ch]
It's here[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Ab/C[/ch]      [ch]Fm/C#[/ch]
The moment is now[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Fm6/D[/ch]     [ch]Ebsus2[/ch]
About to decide[/tab]
[tab][ch]Edim[/ch]    [ch]Gdim[/ch]   [ch]Fm7[/ch]
Let him be  -  lieve[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Fm7[/ch]
Or leave him behind[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Db/F[/ch]
But keep me near in your heart[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Db/Bb[/ch]     [ch]Ab/C[/ch]     [ch]Fm/C#[/ch]
And know, whatever you do[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Fm6/D[/ch]        [ch]Ebsus2[/ch]
I'm here by your side[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch] [ch]Bb7[/ch]       [ch]Ebmaj9[/ch]     [ch]Abmaj7[/ch]
You said that maybe it's over[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7-5[/ch]  [ch]Db7+11[/ch]           [ch]Abmaj7[/ch]
       Not if you don't want it to be[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]              [ch]Cm7[/ch]
For once in your life, here's your miracle[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]
Stand up and fight[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]   [ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]Db/Bb[/ch]
This is it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db/Eb[/ch]         [ch]Abmaj9[/ch]         [ch]F7[/ch]
   Make no mistake where you are (this is it)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db/Eb[/ch]              [ch]Eb/F[/ch] [ch]F7[/ch]
   You're going no further (this is it)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db/Eb[/ch]         [ch]Eb/C[/ch]    [ch]Eb/F[/ch]  [ch]F7[/ch]
   Don't be a fool anymore    (this is it)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db/Eb[/ch]             [ch]Abmaj9[/ch]  [ch]Gm7-5[/ch]  [ch]C7-9[/ch]
   The waiting is over[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]           [ch]Cm7[/ch]               [ch]Gm7[/ch]  [ch]C7[/ch]  [ch]Bb/D[/ch]  [ch]C7/E[/ch]
   No one can tell you what you know[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]              [ch]Dbmaj11[/ch]          [ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]
   Who makes the choice of how it goes[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Fsus4[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]
It's not up to me this time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gbmaj9[/ch]               [ch]Fsus4[/ch]
There comes a day in every life[/tab]

[Instrumental]
[ch]Eb/F[/ch]  [ch]Fm[/ch]  [ch]Eb/F[/ch]  [ch]Fm[/ch]  [ch]Eb/F[/ch]  [ch]Fm[/ch]  [ch]Eb/F[/ch]  [ch]Fm[/ch]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]   [ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]Db/Bb[/ch]
This is it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db/Eb[/ch]        [ch]Abmaj9[/ch]          [ch]F7[/ch]
   Make no mistake where you are (this is it)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db/Eb[/ch]                [ch]Eb/F[/ch]   [ch]F7[/ch]
   Your backs to the corner    (this is it)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db/Eb[/ch]         [ch]Eb/C[/ch]    [ch]Eb/F[/ch]  [ch]F7[/ch]
   Don't be a fool anymore     (this is it)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db/Eb[/ch]             [ch]Eb/F[/ch]   [ch]F7[/ch]
   The waiting is over     (this is it)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db/Eb[/ch]                        [ch]Abmaj9[/ch]     [ch]F7[/ch]
   Nowhere to run and theres nowhere to hide (this is it)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db/Eb[/ch]                  [ch]Eb/F[/ch]  [ch]F7[/ch]
   But you're going no further (this is it)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db/Eb[/ch]                               [ch]Eb/F[/ch]          [ch]F7[/ch]
   I got to tell you, you've been a fool all your life (this is it)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db/Eb[/ch]                 [ch]F7[/ch]
   But the waiting is over[/tab]

[Outro]
[ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Eb/F[/ch]  [ch]F7[/ch]  [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Bbsus4[/ch]
